title: Decisions, Pattern Matching, and Iteration · Runtime Lens: Python Match Patterns
summary: Route support requests through priority rules, repeated records, and changed data conditions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python match patterns increment in a support-request routing engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use match and case for structural patterns, captures, guards, alternatives, and exhaustive fallback behavior.
Use if, elif, else, conditional expressions, and guard clauses to express exclusive and early-exit decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
